key_insight: BLUEX v2 expands Portuguese LLM evaluation from multiple-choice to open-ended, image-rich university exam questions that require deeper mathematical reasoning and written explanation.
engineering_relevance: It provides a realistic benchmark for testing and improving LLMs on high-stakes educational tasks in Portuguese, especially where reasoning, grading, and multimodal understanding matter.
method: Built from UNICAMP (Comvest) and USP (Fuvest) second-phase exams from 2022-2025
Contains 395 questions and 919 graded subquestions, with subject labels, reference answers, rubric criteria, and six cognitive tags
Evaluated 21 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol
evidence_signal: The benchmark includes 395 questions, 919 graded subquestions, and 55.7% image-based items, and model scores ranged from 4.18 to 9.10 on a 0-10 scale.
watch_item: Because scoring relies on an LLM-as-a-judge setup, results may be sensitive to rubric quality, judge bias, and the handling of subjective open-ended responses.
paper_title: BLUEX v2: Benchmarking LLMs on Open-Ended Questions from Brazilian University Entrance Exams
